name: Example Task
description: A simple example task with 3 steps

params.title: Welcome
params.body:
Welcome to this learning task!

Click Next to continue.

params.title: Instructions
params.body:
Here are the instructions for this task:

  • Read each step carefully
  • Use the navigation buttons to move between steps
  • Complete all steps to finish the task

params.title: Complete
params.body:
Congratulations! You have completed the task.

You can go back to review previous steps or close this task.
